data.title: A whale repurchased 11.21 million Fartcoins about 8 hours ago, with an average price of $0.89
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, about 8 hours ago, a whale address purchased 11.21 million Fartcoins for about 9.97 million US dollars, with an average price of about 0.89 US dollars. Previously, the address had purchased 13.39 million Fartcoins for 8.15 million US dollars, with an average price of about 0.61 US dollars, and sold them at a price of about 0.86 US dollars, making a profit of about 3.33 million US dollars.

data.title: Trump: Japan will come to the United States today to negotiate on tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that Japan will come to the United States today to negotiate on tariffs. I will participate in the talks with Japan. The US Treasury Secretary and Commerce Secretary will also attend the meeting. I hope to find a solution. Military support costs and trade fairness are one of the topics of the talks. (Jin Shi)

data.title: A whale withdrew 16,950 BNB from CEX and sold 9,550 of them
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, a whale withdrew 16,950 BNB (about 9.9 million US dollars) from Binance 19 hours ago. At present, the whale has sold 9,550 BNB in ​​exchange for 5.53 million US dollars in USDC and USDT, and deposited 5.07 million US dollars into Aave V3. The whale still holds 7,200 BNB (about 4.16 million US dollars) and may continue to sell to deposit into Aave.

data.title: South Korean Presidential Candidate Advocates Blockchain Integration
data.description: According to Foresight News, South Korean presidential candidate Hong Joon-pyo from the People Power Party expressed his commitment to fostering the blockchain and virtual asset industries. During a policy announcement on Wednesday, Hong stated his intention to implement significant regulatory reforms similar to those of the U.S. President Donald Trump's administration. He aims to integrate blockchain technology into public and administrative services and develop virtual assets into a standalone industry.

data.title: European Stocks Favored by Investors Amid U.S. Trade Concerns
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a recent survey by Bank of America reveals that European stocks are gaining favor among investors due to concerns over U.S. economic growth linked to trade tariffs. The survey indicates that a majority of investors anticipate Europe to have the best-performing stock market by 2025. Among those surveyed, a net 22% have increased their holdings in European stocks. In contrast, a net 36% have reduced their holdings in U.S. stocks, marking the highest level of reduction in nearly two years.

data.title: Bitget launches on-chain rebate plan to achieve cross-ecological benefits between CEX and DEX
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget officially launched the industry's first on-chain rebate program, extending the rebate mechanism from centralized trading (CEX) to the on-chain ecosystem. Through this plan, partners can get up to 40% of on-chain transaction rebates when promoting Bitget on-chain trading (Onchain) products, and can be superimposed with the existing spot and contract rebate structure to encourage community co-builders to achieve multi-channel benefits between CEX and DeFi.
The Bitget on-chain rebate program is open to global partners. After joining, partners will receive an exclusive referral link to simultaneously promote spot, contract trading and Bitget on-chain trading (Onchain). In addition to the basic rebate, Bitget also has a tiered incentive mechanism. Partners with a monthly trading volume of US$20 million can be promoted to the highest rebate level, continuing to encourage long-term cooperation and ecological co-construction.

data.title: Soneium Sony Chain cooperates with EigenLayer and AltLayer to build a fast confirmation layer for Soneium
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Soneium Sony Chain cooperated with EigenLayer and AltLayer to build a fast confirmation layer for Soneium, which only accepts ASTR and restaked ETH as pledged assets.
This cooperation marks that ASTR maintains the infrastructure security of Soneium as a pledged asset. It is reported that ASTR is the core asset of Sony's ecosystem and the core pledge token of its ecosystem. It is also the basic token of Soneium's ecosystem before the issuance of the coin.

data.title: Semler to raise 500M to buy Bitcoin
data.description:
Semler Scientific is pushing forward with its Bitcoin investment strategy despite a $41. 8 million paper loss and plans to raise $500 million through a securities sale.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/semler-plans-to-buy-more-bitcoin

data.title: Whale Investor Acquires Over 3,000 ETH Amid Market Movements
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain analyst Yu Jin has reported that the whale investor known as nemorino.eth recently purchased 3,079.8 ETH for 4.802 million USDC, with an average price of $1,559 per ETH. Previously, in February and March, nemorino.eth anticipated a decline in ETH prices and sold 15,800 ETH at an average price of $2,407, totaling approximately $38.1 million.

data.title: A whale spent 4.802 million USDC to buy 3079.8 ETH an hour and a half ago, with an average price of $1559
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, the whale nemorino.eth spent 4.802 million USDC to buy 3079.8 ETH an hour and a half ago, with an average price of $1,559. 
Previously, the whale nemorino.eth believed that ETH would continue to fall in February and March, and sold 15,800 ETH (about $38.1 million) at an average price of $2,407.
